name: EUCOM — Donbas active EW
subtitle: High density, contact line
description: Russian active-EW posture along the Donbas line of contact (2024–2025 reporting). Sources: Sprotyv G7 Russian EW Systems Analytic Insight Report (Nov 2023), CSIS Russia EW briefs, RUSI assessments, Telegram milblogger reporting. Drops a representative mix of Borisoglebsk-class vehicular DF, Pole-21 EW belt, Leer-3 BPLA-derived COMINT, and Murmansk-BN strategic HF DF.

threats.note: Pole-21 EW belt — 1–2.5 GHz GNSS/comms band
Leer-3 / Orlan-10 RB-341V — Orlan-borne COMINT, fast TTF
Shipovnik-Aero — wideband SIGINT with high antenna gain
Murmansk-BN strategic HF DF — long range, slow TTF
